      • getLines3D

        public ij.ImagePlus getLines3D(ij.ImagePlus imp,
                               int[] xp,
                               int[] yp,
                               int[] zp,
                               int c,
                               int r)
        Parameters:
        imp - The image to work with
        xp - array of xpoints
        yp - array of y points
        zp - array of z points
        c - color of the line
        r - radius of the line
        Returns:
        get the image filled with 3D lines
